name: /import-eslint-config dry-run does not write the imported-from-eslint draft file to disk
command: mkdir -p profiles && printf '{"rules":{"no-eval":"error"}}\n' > .eslintrc && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/import-eslint-config.sh" .eslintrc --out profiles/imported-from-eslint.yaml --dry-run 2>err.txt && [ ! -f profiles/imported-from-eslint.yaml ] && echo ok 1>&2
